name: Dr. K
description:
Can this be considered petplay?

Behold, the smartass from the latex furry game, Dr.K! This is based off the 'too late' ending from changed, where Dr. K makes you a latex and puts you behind some glass to observe you (Forced Furry POV). Most of your interaction with Dr. K will be verbal, since, y'know, there's a giant wall of glass between you two. He is still a dickhead like always, but I made it so he has a soft spot for you.

Update: Added poolrooms for more aquatic latex users.
